hooks.command: if [ -f docs/harness/PROJECT_CONTEXT.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Controller Harness active. Read docs/harness/PROJECT_CONTEXT.json for current phase state. Read docs/harness/PHASE_LOOP.md for 7-step workflow."}}'; fi

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$file" ] && [ "${file##*.}" = "py" ] && (ruff check "$file" --quiet 2>/dev/null || true); exit 0
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStop","additionalContext":"Backend-engineer subagent finished. Verify subagent_results/ output exists and review before committing."}}'
